data.title: Apple Hospitality REIT to announce quarterly earnings on 2026-02-23, with estimated EPS of $0.18. Investors await guidance and hope to surpass expectations. Last quarter, EPS exceeded by $0.13.
data.description: Apple Hospitality REIT (NYSE: APLE) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on February 23, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.18 for the company. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is crucial for new investors to recognize that guidance plays a crucial role in stock price movements. In the previous quarter, Apple Hospitality REIT outperformed EPS estimates by $0.13, but this was followed by a 2.1% decline in the share price the following day. For further details, the complete article can be found on the website Benzinga.com.

data.title: Domino's Pizza's upcoming earnings report on 2026-02-23 expected to reveal an EPS of $5.37. Investors eagerly await to see if estimates are surpassed and for guidance for the next quarter. Earnings track record includes beating EPS by $0.11 last quarter.
data.description: Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ: DPZ) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Monday, February 23, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $5.37 for the renowned pizza chain. Investors are eagerly awaiting this announcement with hopes of exceeding expectations and positive guidance for the next quarter. It is important to emphasize that guidance often influences stock price fluctuations, making it a significant factor for new investors to consider. In the previous quarter, Domino's Pizza outperformed expectations by $0.11 per share, indicating a strong track record in earnings. For a more detailed account, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Erie Indemnity set to release EPS of $1.59 on 2026-02-23, with hopes high for surpassing estimates.
data.description: Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ: ERIE) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings report on Monday, February 23, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.59 for the company. The market is eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for Erie Indemnity to exceed these expectations and offer positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It's crucial for potential investors to recognize that guidance plays a pivotal role in influencing stock prices. In the previous quarter, Erie Indemnity outperformed expectations with an EPS that surpassed estimates by $0.13. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FRE Lush 15mg Mega Pack wins 2026 Product of the Year USA Award after study of 40,000 shoppers with Kantar.
data.description: A nicotine pouch brand, FRE® Nicotine Pouches from Santa Monica, California, has won the prestigious 2026 Product of the Year USA Awards. This recognition was based on a national survey involving 40,000 American customers in collaboration with Kantar, an influential firm in consumer research. Product of the Year is a major awards program where consumers vote for innovative products. The winning product, FRE Lush 15mg Mega Pack, stood out among the competition.

data.title: Stock of Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) drops by 25% after earnings report. Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi with losses over $50,000.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses exceeding $50,000 in Helen of Troy to reach out to him directly. If you have incurred losses of over $50,000 in Helen of Troy stock or options, it is advisable to contact James Wilson to explore potential options regarding your situation.

data.title: BrandJet AI introduces Artemis MCP to assist GTM teams with workflows. Launch event on Feb 20, 2026 in San Francisco.
data.description: In San Francisco on February 20, 2026, BrandJet AI introduced Artemis, a cutting-edge Model Context Protocol (MCP) layer. This innovative platform aims to assist go-to-market (GTM) teams in implementing intricate multi-step workflows seamlessly through natural language processing technology.

data.title: Kohler wins Best of Show Booth Design at KBIS for fourth year; recognized for innovation and sustainability.
data.description: A respected pioneer in design and innovation has earned accolades for groundbreaking product displays, innovative wellness offerings, and cutting-edge sustainability progress. Kohler, based in Kohler, Wisconsin, proudly announces that it has secured the prestigious Best of Show title at the 2026 Kitchen & Bath Expo. This achievement signifies Kohler's leadership in the industry, showcasing revolutionary solutions that push boundaries and prioritize sustainability.

data.title: Kinko Optical Co., Ltd. selects Beneq C2R™ to scale AR waveguides for XR glasses, to meet high-volume production demand.
data.description: In Taiwan, Kinko Optical Co., LTD., an Asian ODM, has recently integrated Beneq's C2R™ plasma-enhanced spatial ALD system to advance its manufacturing capabilities. By adopting this system, Kinko is gearing up for large-scale production of high-index, low-loss optical coatings on diffractive waveguides for its partners. This development is crucial as the eXtended Reality (XR) sector is experiencing significant growth, particularly driven by the increasing desire for immersive AR experiences in consumer electronics like XR glasses. This move comes at a time when the industry is witnessing notable advancements in this area.
